channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Over 1.5 Million Pilgrims Begin Haj in Makkah Amid Middle East Tensions and Security Concerns
item.description: Over 1.5 million Muslims from around the world have started the annual Haj pilgrimage in Makkah, Saudi Arabia, gathering in the vast tent city of Mina after performing tawaf around the Holy Kaaba. The...

item.title: Fubara restates APC membership and highlights completion of Rumuigbo General and Neuropsychiatric Hospitals in Rivers State
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, has publicly reaffirmed that he remains a member of the All Progressives Congress (APC), putting to rest recent rumours suggesting he had defected to anot...

item.title: PNP joins investigation into Pampanga hotel construction site collapse in Angeles City
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) has confirmed that it is assisting in the ongoing investigation into a major building collapse in Angeles City, Pampanga, which occurred at a hotel construction si...

item.title: Timeline of AFL great Neale Daniher’s life, career and motor neurone disease advocacy
item.description: Neale Daniher, one of Australian Rules football’s most respected figures, has been remembered through a detailed timeline of his life, career and off-field legacy following his death aged 65. Born on ...

item.title: How agentic AI is transforming marketing and commerce through Google’s new tools
item.description: The article explores the rise of agentic artificial intelligence and its growing impact on consumer behaviour and digital marketing. Unlike traditional generative AI, which responds to prompts by prod...

item.title: Delhi experiences second warm night amid ongoing heatwave conditions; IMD maintains yellow alert
item.description: Delhi has recorded its second warm night of the season as temperatures continue to remain unusually high amid persistent heatwave-like conditions. According to data from Safdarjung, the city’s base we...

item.title: Review: Paul McCartney’s The Boys of Dungeon Lane highlights enduring melodic brilliance at 83
item.description: The review of Paul McCartney’s 27th studio album, The Boys of Dungeon Lane, presents the record as a reflective yet creatively vibrant work from the 83-year-old former Beatle. Framed partly as a nosta...

item.title: Fire at South Gate tire recycling facility contained after shelter-in-place order
item.description: Fire crews in Los Angeles County successfully knocked down a large industrial fire that broke out Sunday afternoon at a tire-recycling facility in South Gate, California. The blaze, which produced hea...

item.title: PM Shehbaz discusses Middle East peace efforts and Pakistan-China cooperation during meeting with Chinese Premier Li Qiang
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, during his official visit to China, stressed the need for Pakistan and China to work closely together to support peace efforts in the Middle East amid the ongoing tensio...

item.title: Afenifere condemns attacks on Oyo schools, warns of rising insecurity in Yorubaland
item.description: The pan-Yoruba socio-political group, Afenifere, has raised serious concern over the recent coordinated attacks on three schools in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State. The incidents, which repo...

item.title: Marcos to Discuss Defense, Energy Security, and Investments During Japan State Visit
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. and First Lady Liza Araneta-Marcos are set to visit Tokyo, Japan from May 26 to 29, 2026, upon the invitation of the Japanese government. According to the Department of ...

item.title: NCRPO reports 39% drop in index crimes in Metro Manila amid intensified police operations
item.description: The National Capital Region Police Office (NCRPO) reported a significant decline in crime incidents in Metro Manila, with index crimes dropping by 39% from May 18 to 24, 2026 compared to the same peri...

item.title: Supreme Court takes suo motu cognisance of Twisha Sharma death case amid dowry harassment and forensic investigation
item.description: The death of 26-year-old model-turned-actor Twisha Sharma in Bhopal has become a major national case after the Supreme Court took suo motu cognisance of the matter. Twisha, who married advocate Samart...

item.title: Mamelodi Sundowns Crowned CAF Champions League Winners After Draw Against FAR Rabat
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns from South Africa have been crowned CAF Champions League winners after securing an important 1-1 draw against Moroccan side FAR Rabat on May 24, 2026. The result in Morocco was enoug...

item.title: Pipeline rupture in East Los Angeles spills crude oil into storm drains and L.A. River, prompting wildlife rescue effort
item.description: A crude oil pipeline rupture in East Los Angeles released an estimated 2,400 gallons of oil into nearby storm drains, eventually contaminating the Los Angeles River. The incident occurred early Friday...

item.title: Daily zodiac horoscope predictions for May 25, 2026
item.description: This article presents the daily horoscope readings for May 25, 2026, offering brief astrological guidance for each zodiac sign, along with a general message for birthdays falling on this date. The ove...

item.title: Legal Aid SA and SALAWU dispute over retirement policy moves closer to protected strike action
item.description: Legal Aid South Africa is facing the possibility of protected strike action after the Commission for Conciliation, Mediation and Arbitration (CCMA) issued a certificate of non-resolution in its disput...

item.title: Worcestershire council crisis highlights tensions in Britain’s shift to multiparty local politics
item.description: The article examines political turmoil in Worcestershire County Council as a case study of Britain’s increasingly fragmented multiparty system and the difficulties Westminster faces in adapting to it....

item.title: Itshokeng Kekana on how poor implementation of BEE is undermining transformation and public trust in South Africa
item.description: In this opinion piece, Itshokeng Kekana reflects on the long-term impact of Broad-Based Black Economic Empowerment (BEE) in South Africa, arguing that while the policy was originally designed to corre...
